# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

# [YAML Header] Envoy Proxy Configuration File Format Version 2 (AC) - Do not remove or modify this line! The format version used to generate the configuration file should be specified here and is checked during runtime by default. If you are using a different tool, please update it accordingly
apiVersion: envoyproxy/v3:Profile
kind: Profile
metadata: 
 name: api_gateway # Name of your profile (optional)  
 global:   
   accessLogFile: /dev/stdout    
 listeners:     
 - address: "0.0.0.0"      
   port: 80                
 routeConfigs :        [ ]             
 clusters:        
 # Cluster for backend services (service1 and service2)   
 - name: outbound_cluster              
   type: STRICT_DNS     
   connectTimeout: 5s         
   lbPolicy: ROUND_ROBIN    
   ipPreference: ROUTE      
   http2Enabled : true        # Enables HTTP/2 if available on the upstream server.   
 clustersConfigurations:         [ ]             
 route:     
 - match: 
     prefix: "/api"          
   cluster: outbound_cluster               
 healthChecks:          [ { path: /healthz, interval: 5s }]            # Health check configuration for the upstream service.   
 connectionPoolings :       []             
 statsServers {}
